extortion.description: [AI generated] MGAE.COM refers to MGA Entertainment, Inc., a privately-owned American manufacturer of children's toys and entertainment products. Founded in 1979, it is known for brands like Bratz, L.O.L. Surprise!, Little Tikes, and others. The company's goal is to provide innovative, high-quality products that focus on entertainment and fun, enriching kids' playtime experiences worldwide.
